name: Toast
purpose: Transient feedback for background actions such as saves, fetch results, and errors.

structures.name: Simple Toast
structures.notes: Single line with a tone icon; auto-dismiss by default.

structures.name: Title Toast
structures.notes: Adds a bold title line for richer feedback.

structures.name: Action Toast
structures.notes: Trailing inline action such as undo or retry.

interactionNotes: Tone is carried by a small leading icon and tinted border-left, keeping the surface calm.
Stack toasts with consistent spacing; newest enters from the same edge.
